scripts.build:pages: tsc -b && vite build --mode pages && node scripts/prepare-gh-pages.mjs
scripts.preview:pages: npm run build:pages && vite preview --mode pages
scripts.build:ios:buyer: npm run build:buyer && node scripts/link-razorpay-spm.mjs && CAP_APP=buyer npx cap sync ios && node scripts/vendor-ios-plugins.mjs && node scripts/patch-ios-spm.mjs
scripts.build:ios:seller: npm run build:seller && node scripts/link-razorpay-spm.mjs && CAP_APP=seller npx cap sync ios && node scripts/vendor-ios-plugins.mjs && node scripts/patch-ios-spm.mjs
scripts.build:ios:delivery: npm run build:delivery && node scripts/link-razorpay-spm.mjs && CAP_APP=delivery npx cap sync ios && node scripts/vendor-ios-plugins.mjs && node scripts/patch-ios-spm.mjs
scripts.vendor:ios-plugins: node scripts/link-razorpay-spm.mjs && node scripts/vendor-ios-plugins.mjs && node scripts/patch-ios-spm.mjs
scripts.postinstall: node scripts/link-razorpay-spm.mjs && node scripts/vendor-ios-plugins.mjs && node scripts/patch-ios-spm.mjs && node scripts/patch-razorpay-android.mjs
scripts.build:android:buyer: npm run build:buyer && node scripts/patch-razorpay-android.mjs && CAP_APP=buyer npx cap sync android
scripts.build:android:seller: npm run build:seller && node scripts/patch-razorpay-android.mjs && CAP_APP=seller npx cap sync android
scripts.build:android:delivery: npm run build:delivery && node scripts/patch-razorpay-android.mjs && CAP_APP=delivery npx cap sync android
scripts.apk:buyer: npm run build:android:buyer && node scripts/patch-razorpay-android.mjs && node scripts/assemble-android-apk.mjs buyer
scripts.apk:seller: npm run build:android:seller && node scripts/patch-razorpay-android.mjs && node scripts/assemble-android-apk.mjs seller
scripts.apk:delivery: npm run build:android:delivery && node scripts/patch-razorpay-android.mjs && node scripts/assemble-android-apk.mjs delivery
scripts.apk:all: npm run apk:buyer && npm run apk:seller && npm run apk:delivery
scripts.ios:buyer: npm run build:ios:buyer && CAP_APP=buyer npx cap open ios
scripts.ios:seller: npm run build:ios:seller && CAP_APP=seller npx cap open ios
scripts.ios:delivery: npm run build:ios:delivery && CAP_APP=delivery npx cap open ios
scripts.android:buyer: npm run build:android:buyer && CAP_APP=buyer npx cap open android
scripts.android:seller: npm run build:android:seller && CAP_APP=seller npx cap open android
scripts.android:delivery: npm run build:android:delivery && CAP_APP=delivery npx cap open android
scripts.cap:add:buyer: CAP_APP=buyer npx cap add ios && CAP_APP=buyer npx cap add android
scripts.cap:add:seller: CAP_APP=seller npx cap add ios && CAP_APP=seller npx cap add android
scripts.cap:add:delivery: CAP_APP=delivery npx cap add ios && CAP_APP=delivery npx cap add android
